label: 2023 AHS National PUF household relation
notes: One housing-unit record per CONTROL is expected for the governed household relation.

label: 2023 AHS National PUF mortgage relation
notes: Mortgage rows are one-to-many from household and must be preaggregated before household weighting.

label: 2023 AHS National PUF project relation
notes: The public project relation is related to household through CONTROL.
No PROJECTNO column is required or assumed.
A row-level project identifier may be certified later if verified against the physical release.

label: AHS project relation in restricted-use context
notes: Physical row identity remains unresolved and is not used by the PUF runtime.
